originalTitle: Fears for press freedom as billionaire takes control of East Africa's largest media house
title: Fears for press freedom as billionaire takes control of East Africa's largest media house
content: Rostam Aziz's purchase raises questions about continued journalistic independence in the region.

originalTitle: France returns sacred 'talking drum' looted during colonial rule to Ivory Coast
title: France returns sacred 'talking drum' looted during colonial rule to Ivory Coast
content: The move forms part of a broader process of returning cultural artefacts to African countries that started in 2017.‎

originalTitle: Ghana star to deny rape charges, UK court hears
title: Ghana star to deny rape charges, UK court hears
content: Partey is to appear at crown court next month, charged with raping a woman in December 2020.

originalTitle: Protesters in Cuba attack Communist party office in rare riot over blackout
title: Protesters in Cuba attack Communist party office in rare riot over blackout
content: Anti-government protesters in Cuba sparked an outbreak of violence amid worsening blackouts and food shortages.

originalTitle: Trump says ‘many countries’ will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
title: Trump says ‘many countries’ will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
content: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.

originalTitle: UN chief Guterres says ‘no military solution, only diplomacy’ for Lebanon
title: UN chief Guterres says ‘no military solution, only diplomacy’ for Lebanon
content: Sources report Lebanon preparing delegation for talks with Israel, while Guterres drums up humanitarian support.

originalTitle: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
title: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
content: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

originalTitle: More US Marines and warships being moved to Middle East, reports say
title: More US Marines and warships being moved to Middle East, reports say
content: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.

originalTitle: Treasure hunter freed from prison after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
title: Treasure hunter freed from prison after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
content: Tommy Thompson spent more than a decade in prison after refusing to disclose the whereabouts of 500 missing gold coins.

originalTitle: 'They know where I am' - could Redknapp return to manage Spurs?
title: 'They know where I am' - could Redknapp return to manage Spurs?
content: Former Tottenham boss Harry Redknapp says the Spurs hierarchy "know where I am" if they decide to replace interim boss Igor Tudor – so could the 79-year-old make a sensational return to management?

originalTitle: Carrick is doing an excellent job - Ratcliffe
title: Carrick is doing an excellent job - Ratcliffe
content: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says Michael Carrick is doing an excellent job at Old Trafford but refuses to be drawn on whether he will get the role on a permanent basis.

originalTitle: Iraola 'frustrated' at wasteful Bournemouth in Burnley draw
title: Iraola 'frustrated' at wasteful Bournemouth in Burnley draw
content: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola believes his side had "more than enough chances to score" and criticises the decision not to award striker Evanilson a penalty, as Bournemouth settle for a 0-0 draw with Burnley at Turf Moor.
